modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a field technician and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some contradictory ordering.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Trouble resizing pictures in Word document.

full_description_text: I am trying to make pictures smaller in Word. The pictures are too big and I don’t know how to resize them. I need help with this issue, please.
short_description: Trouble resizing pictures in Word document.
description: I am trying to make pictures smaller in Word. The pictures are too big and I don’t know how to resize them. I need help with this issue, please.
